initial_candidates.sql:
WITH cleaned_salaries AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        CAST(
            REPLACE(
                REPLACE(
                    REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(salary, '₹', ''),
                            ',', ''
                        ),
                        ' ', ''
                    ),
                    'Lakh', ''
                ),
                'lakh', ''
            ) AS REAL
        ) AS salary_numeric
    FROM (
        -- Assuming there's a salaries table (not in schema) but since none is provided, 
        -- and no table contains salary data per the schema, we cannot proceed.
        -- This is a placeholder to indicate that without a salary-related table, 
        -- the query is not possible.
        SELECT NULL AS location, NULL AS company, NULL AS salary
        LIMIT 0
    )
),
national_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(salary_numeric) AS avg_national_salary
    FROM cleaned_salaries
),
city_company_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        AVG(salary_numeric) AS avg_salary_in_city
    FROM cleaned_salaries
    WHERE location IN ('Mumbai', 'Pune', 'New Delhi', 'Hyderabad')
    GROUP BY location, company
),
ranked_companies AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        avg_salary_in_city,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY location ORDER BY avg_salary_in_city DESC) AS rn
    FROM city_company_avg
),
top5_per_city AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        avg_salary_in_city
    FROM ranked_companies
    WHERE rn <= 5
)
SELECT 
    t.location AS Location,
    t.company AS Company_Name,
    ROUND(t.avg_salary_in_city, 2) AS Average_Salary_in_State,
    ROUND(n.avg_national_salary, 2) AS Average_Salary_in_Country
FROM top5_per_city t
CROSS JOIN national_avg n
ORDER BY t.location, t.avg_salary_in_city DESC;

WITH cleaned_salary_data AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        CAST(
            REPLACE(
                REPLACE(
                    REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(
                                REPLACE(
                                    REPLACE(
                                        REPLACE(
                                            REPLACE(
                                                REPLACE(salary, '$', ''),
                                            '₹', ''),
                                        ',', ''),
                                    ' ', ''),
                                'INR', ''),
                            'Rs', ''),
                        'INR', ''),
                    'Rs.', ''),
                '.', '')
            AS REAL
        ) AS salary_numeric
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            location,
            company,
            salary
        FROM 
            salary_dataset
        WHERE 
            salary IS NOT NULL
            AND location IN ('Mumbai', 'Pune', 'New Delhi', 'Hyderabad')
    )
),
company_avg_by_location AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        AVG(salary_numeric) AS avg_salary_in_state
    FROM 
        cleaned_salary_data
    GROUP BY 
        location, company
),
national_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(salary_numeric) AS avg_salary_in_country
    FROM 
        cleaned_salary_data
),
ranked_companies AS (
    SELECT 
        cbl.location,
        cbl.company,
        cbl.avg_salary_in_state,
        na.avg_salary_in_country,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cbl.location ORDER BY cbl.avg_salary_in_state DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        company_avg_by_location cbl
    CROSS JOIN 
        national_avg na
)
SELECT 
    location,
    company,
    avg_salary_in_state,
    avg_salary_in_country
FROM 
    ranked_companies
WHERE 
    rn <= 5
    AND location IN ('Mumbai', 'Pune', 'New Delhi', 'Hyderabad')
ORDER BY 
    location, avg_salary_in_state DESC;

WITH cleaned_salaries AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        CAST(
            REPLACE(
                REPLACE(
                    REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(
                                REPLACE(
                                    REPLACE(
                                        REPLACE(
                                            REPLACE(
                                                REPLACE(salary, '₹', ''),
                                            ' ', ''),
                                        ',', ''),
                                    'L', ''),
                                'l', ''),
                            'k', ''),
                        'K', ''),
                    'a', ''),
                'A', '') AS REAL
            ) AS avg_salary
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            TRIM(COALESCE(location, '')) AS location,
            TRIM(COALESCE(company, '')) AS company,
            TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(salary AS TEXT), '')) AS salary
        FROM (
            -- Since no salary table is provided in schema, we must simulate placeholder logic
            -- This is a best-effort interpretation; no actual salary table exists in schema.
            SELECT NULL AS location, NULL AS company, NULL AS salary WHERE 1=0
        )
    )
    WHERE avg_salary IS NOT NULL
),
national_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(avg_salary) AS country_avg
    FROM cleaned_salaries
    WHERE location IN ('Mumbai', 'Pune', 'New Delhi', 'Hyderabad')
),
ranked_companies AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        AVG(avg_salary) AS state_avg,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY location ORDER BY AVG(avg_salary) DESC) AS rn
    FROM cleaned_salaries
    WHERE location IN ('Mumbai', 'Pune', 'New Delhi', 'Hyderabad')
    GROUP BY location, company
),
top5_per_city AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        state_avg
    FROM ranked_companies
    WHERE rn <= 5
)
SELECT 
    t.location AS Location,
    t.company AS Company_Name,
    ROUND(t.state_avg, 2) AS Average_Salary_in_State,
    ROUND(n.country_avg, 2) AS Average_Salary_in_Country
FROM top5_per_city t
CROSS JOIN national_avg n
ORDER BY t.location, t.state_avg DESC;

WITH cleaned_salary AS (
    SELECT 
        TRIM(location) AS location,
        TRIM(company) AS company,
        CAST(
            REPLACE(
                REPLACE(
                    REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(
                                REPLACE(
                                    REPLACE(
                                        REPLACE(
                                            REPLACE(
                                                REPLACE(salary, ',', ''),
                                                '₹', ''
                                            ),
                                            '$', ''
                                        ),
                                        '€', ''
                                    ),
                                    '£', ''
                                ),
                                'CAD', ''
                            ),
                            'AUD', ''
                        ),
                        'CHF', ''
                    ),
                    'DKK', ''
                ),
                'NOK', ''
            ) AS REAL
        ) AS salary_numeric
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            location,
            company,
            salary
        FROM 
            hardware_dim_customer hc
        JOIN 
            hardware_fact_pre_invoice_deductions hf ON hc.customer_code = hf.customer_code
        JOIN 
            web_sales_reps ws ON hf.fiscal_year = ws.id
        JOIN 
            StaffHours sh ON sh.StaffMember = ws.name
        JOIN 
            university_enrollment ue ON ue.OfferNo = sh.StaffMember
        JOIN 
            university_faculty uf ON uf.FacNo = ue.StdNo
        JOIN 
            university_student us ON us.StdNo = uf.FacSupervisor
        JOIN 
            university_offering uo ON uo.FacNo = us.StdClass
        JOIN 
            web_accounts wa ON wa.id = uo.CourseNo
        JOIN 
            web_events we ON we.account_id = wa.id
        JOIN 
            web_orders wo ON wo.id = we.account_id
    ) AS raw_data
    WHERE salary IS NOT NULL
),
national_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(salary_numeric) AS avg_national_salary
    FROM cleaned_salary
),
city_company_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        AVG(salary_numeric) AS avg_salary_in_city
    FROM cleaned_salary
    WHERE location IN ('Mumbai', 'Pune', 'New Delhi', 'Hyderabad')
    GROUP BY location, company
),
ranked_companies AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        avg_salary_in_city,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY location ORDER BY avg_salary_in_city DESC) AS rn
    FROM city_company_avg
),
top5_per_city AS (
    SELECT 
        location,
        company,
        avg_salary_in_city
    FROM ranked_companies
    WHERE rn <= 5
)
SELECT 
    t5.location AS Location,
    t5.company AS Company_Name,
    ROUND(t5.avg_salary_in_city, 2) AS Average_Salary_in_State,
    ROUND(na.avg_national_salary, 2) AS Average_Salary_in_Country
FROM top5_per_city t5
CROSS JOIN national_avg na
ORDER BY t5.location, t5.avg_salary_in_city DESC;
